items.summary: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

items.title: China recovered its first reusable rocket and showed a new way to do it
items.summary: "Clearly, they admire the work that's being done by SpaceX and are trying to replicate it."

items.title: Pack the BougeRV 2026 telescopic camping light for your outdoor adventures while down at $75 low right now
items.summary:
Update: Amazon has dropped the price on this camping light back to the $75 low during a limited-time Lightning sale.

BougeRV 2026 Telescopic Camping Light

Buy for $81 (Reg. $100)

What we love

Got plenty of outdoor adventures planned for the rest of summer? Well, this handy BougeRV camping light is a versatile device that you should definitely consider adding to your kit, as its 15,600mAh battery allows for up to 102 hours of lighting on each full charge. Not only that, but it goes from a 2.4-pound compact and portable size and extends up to 5.5 feet tall, complete with adjustable lights and three modes (daylight, amber, red).

items.title: Sharge’s ICEMAG 3 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W power bank with active cooling 3.0 is down at its second-lowest $68 price, more
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Sharge is offering the ICEMAG 3 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W MagSafe Power Bank going for $67.89 shipped. It’s down from $80 here, which was the lowest price until last month’s Prime Day gave us a new $64 low. If you missed out then, you only have to shell out an extra $4 here today for the second-lowest price we have tracked in its history. If you don’t mind dropping down to 15W charging speeds, you can also save a bit more with the ICEMAG 2 model at $52.90 shipped, down from $70, or there are additional Sharge deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Get auto-tracking security with Anker’s eufy S4 Max 4K Bullet-PTZ camera 4-pack + 2TB hub for $1,100 ($400 off), more
items.summary: Through the official eufyHome Amazon storefront, Anker is offering the comprehensive S4 Max 4K NVR Triple-Lens Bullet-PTZ Security Camera 4-Pack Kit with 2TB NVR hub down at in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

items.title: One new AI platform lets you use GPT, Gemini, Claude, and more at the same time, now $60 for life
items.summary: Getting the best answer out of AI usually means running the same prompt through ChatGPT, then Claude, then Gemini, and comparing them yourself. ChatPlayground AI does that comparison in one window, and you also get access to all the models you usually pay for monthly. Right now, a lifetime subscription is also on sale for $59.97 (reg. $619).

items.title: ENGWE offers first-ever $300 savings on the new L16 utility e-bike with up to a 150-mile range starting from $899
items.summary: We just spotted ENGWE offering the first cash savings on its new L16 Utility e-bike, which has two configurations: a single-battery option at $899 shipped, and a longer-ranged dual-battery option at $1,399 shipped. These variants have been keeping to their $1,199 and $1,699 full prices since hitting the market in April, but now you can score $300 markdowns that set the bar for future discounts, whenever we may see them again. You can also find all the other ENGWE e-bike deals currently being offered on this landing page here.

items.title: Check out the first images of Quest shipwreck
items.summary: The Quest shipwreck is in worse shape than expected, but it has turned into a thriving marine ecosystem.

items.title: Still live: Anker’s latest 45W Nano charger with smart display is down to just $26 today (All colors)
items.summary: A bunch of Anker chargers are back to their Prime Day prices today, and one of the more notable deals worth considering right now gets you the brand’s latest 45W Nano Smart Display charger for $25.99 with free shipping for Prime members or in orders over $35. This popular GaN charger typically sells for $40, and while we have seen a handful of discounts in the past, today’s offer takes $14 off to bring it back down to the Amazon low it hit during the recent Prime Day. That’s 35% off its usual going rate and matches the best single-unit price we have tracked so far, outside of a short-lived two-pack offer that effectively brought each charger down to $25 directly at Anker. The orange, blue, black, and white finishes are all included in the deal, so you can choose the one that best fits your everyday setup.

items.title: Ransomware negotiator hired to represent victims was working for the attackers
items.summary: Six years in prison for man who "sold out the very victims he was hired to represent."

items.title: Friday’s Apple Books and audiobook deals from $2
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best Apple Books deals has arrived, including titles like Giants of the Frost, From the Dead, Brainwash, The Dixon Cornbelt League, All the King’s Men, The Gaming Mind, The Whistleblower, and more. Scope out AirPods 4 at nearly 25% off to upgrade your audiobook experience, as well as this Apple Watch Ultra 3 model at nearly $140 off and the rare price drop on the latest black Apple Magic Mouse, but the books await below.

items.title: New species named after Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha
items.summary: A new species of sea slug has been named after Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha to mark his performance against Spain at the World Cup.

items.title: Study shows how toxic RFK Jr.’s change to measles vaccine is for US toddlers
items.summary: The children who get a combination shot are some of the most vulnerable.

items.title: Rarely discounted orange Beats Solo Buds down at $50 for today only (Nearly 40% off)
items.summary: As you might have noticed from this morning’s coverage, Beats has taken over the Best Buy Deals of the Day to deliver what is effectively a one-day flash sale. Headphones, cables, cases, and more are starting from $9.50, but the standout deal for us is the orange Beats Solo Buds you can’t buy on Amazon down at $50.

items.title: Code full-time with this $42 Microsoft Visual Studio Pro 2026 and a premium coding bundle ($2,000 value)
items.summary: For just $41.99 (reg. $1,999.99), you can learn to code and practice with professional software in your own time. Just ensure you make your purchase by July 12 to make the most of this deal.

items.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
items.summary: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

items.title: Malaysia EV registrations nearly double in June 2026, Proton e.MAS 5 leads again
items.summary: Malaysia’s electric vehicle (EV) market continue to show strong momentum in June 2026, with 6,215 units registered according to the latest JPJ data. That’s an increase of 89.9% compared to 3,272 EVs registered in June 2025. EVs accounted for 8.52% of Malaysia’s 72,943 total vehicle registrations in June, making it the second-highest monthly EV market […]

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
items.summary: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

items.title: Valve's new Steam Machine verification system is silent on these Steam Deck-busters

items.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says

items.title: An orbiting disco ball gave Einstein’s theory its most precise test yet
items.summary: The Earth may not be that massive, but it still distorts space-time.

items.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone

items.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels

items.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
items.summary: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

items.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
items.summary: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

items.title: Redditor Exposes Fake 16TB SSD Scam After Finding Weights And A microSD Card Inside
items.summary:
One Reddit user recently shared their discovery of a fake 16TB SSD purchased from eBay for under $30 (~RM122). Instead of a high-capacity drive, the enclosure only contained a small board, a microSD card, and some weights hot-glued inside to mimic the feel of a legitimate SSD. u/Hartkralle explained that they regularly purchase suspicious storage […]

The post Redditor Exposes Fake 16TB SSD Scam After Finding Weights And A microSD Card Inside appeared first on Lowyat.NET.
